name: claudecollab
description: An MCP server fronting `opencode serve`, letting Claude Code collaborate with other LLMs (consult, panel, research, review, delegate). Ships slash commands + hardened opencode agents; `npx claudecollab init` wires it into a project. Coexists with the retiring bash layer in collab/ until v1.0.0 (PLAN.md M12).

scripts.test:live: tsx test/client.live.ts && tsx test/consult.live.ts && tsx test/panel.live.ts && tsx test/research.live.ts && tsx test/delegate.live.ts && tsx test/session.live.ts
